construction_algorithm: All cases are static specifications only; no executable project test source is included.
Every fixture reference resolves to one fixture_catalog key. Bytes are exact hex/UTF-8 values, complete frozen-dataclass values, or exact commit/path/SHA-256 pinned canonical bytes.

Persisted JSON fixtures are generated recursively with lexicographic Unicode code-point object-key order, UTF-8, ensure_ascii=false, compact separators, no BOM, no surrounding whitespace, and no final LF.
Schema field-order lists govern closed membership and explicitly declared typed projections only; they never select stored JSON object-key order.
Every deterministic mutation is materialized as an exact complete fixture; no prose-only positive or negative input remains.
Byte mutation fixtures state exact byte offset and operation and retain or recompute expected physical fields as explicitly declared.
BindingQuery fixtures contain all ten declared fields. Accepted-registry json:/table: IDs and internal i0a: relation IDs use separate typed surfaces.
All non-success cases expect established_assurances=(). Every success case names the exact complete assurance tuple.

The complete_snapshot_publication_unit fixture materializes all eight structural members, exact sidecars, cross-member hashes, plan-derived prepared_unit_id, fourteen descriptors, fourteen payload byte strings, and the pinned accepted registry byte identity.
For every value-producing result, compare the entire expected_return_payload, including exact bytes/digest/index/binding/observed fields and all required nulls; code-only comparison is forbidden.
Static contract cases T147-T152 compare exact exports, private exclusions, enum domains, imports/graph, success-assurance map, and result-payload contracts.
Revision 08 exact schema identity: compare role-row selected-content union, exact frozen-production binding union, and pinned RegistryDefinitionIndex by exact string equality.

Revision 08 analysis fixtures: deterministically construct full eight-member SNAPSHOT_PUBLICATION units for analysis_compatibility and analysis_strict; recompute every physical and logical hash and plan-derived prepared_unit_id using standard-library algorithms only.
Revision 08 normal-final marker closure: use exact accepted PATH_GRAMMAR_REGISTRY.json branches; both marker targets bind json:finalization_marker_v23 and remain excluded from I0A execution.

canonical_governing_bytes.constructor_rule: Each of the five GoverningPackageBytes fields is the one exact immutable byte string identified by scope_review_anchor, source_path, and complete_file_sha256; the tuple is complete and field names exactly match the frozen dataclass.
canonical_governing_bytes.identity_rule: each member is the exact immutable byte string at anchor/path/hash; no local recovery or network read is authorized by this fixture

canonical_registry_bytes.constructor_rule: Use the exact immutable bytes at the pinned commit/path/hash. The public materializer first verifies this SHA-256, then decodes UTF-8 strictly, rejects duplicate object keys through json.loads(object_pairs_hook=_reject_duplicate_json_object_pairs), and requires canonical reserialization byte equality.
canonical_registry_bytes.identity_rule: commit+path+SHA-256 denotes the exact immutable byte string; no alternative source is permitted

cross_member_invariants: all four structural sidecars derive from the independently derived exact structural target path and exact paired target bytes
PREPARATION_PLAN planned_objects and PREPARED_UNIT objects have identical ordinal/role/schema/mode/target tuples
PREPARED_UNIT descriptor physical sizes and hashes equal object_payload_bytes_by_ordinal
PARTITION_PAYLOAD ordinal 0 path, partition_id, and logical_sha256 equal snapshot_claim.partition_entries[0]

descriptor_set_duplicate_target_defensiv.assumption_boundary: private defensive invariant helper receives summaries only after public role-local validation; this fixture directly tests duplicate-target detection without mutating frozen production grammars

governing_package_bytes_one_byte_changed.exactness_rule: Applying xor_0x01 at byte offset 0 to spec_bytes of the exact pinned base fixture yields one unique byte string; every other field is byte-identical to the complete base fixture.

malformed_structural_claim_scope_input.constructor_rule: hex-decode payload_bytes_hex and paired_target_bytes_hex; construct the frozen dataclass with exactly the declared fields
malformed_structural_claim_scope_input.mutation_rule: replace exact canonical payload with one byte 0x7b; recompute physical expectations

missing_paired_proof_CLAIM_SCOPE_sha256.constructor_rule: hex-decode payload_bytes_hex and paired_target_bytes_hex; construct the frozen dataclass with exactly the declared fields

missing_paired_proof_CLAIM_SEMANTIC_sha2.constructor_rule: hex-decode payload_bytes_hex and paired_target_bytes_hex; construct the frozen dataclass with exactly the declared fields

missing_paired_proof_PREPARATION_PLAN_sh.constructor_rule: hex-decode payload_bytes_hex and paired_target_bytes_hex; construct the frozen dataclass with exactly the declared fields

missing_paired_proof_PREPARED_UNIT_sha25.constructor_rule: hex-decode payload_bytes_hex and paired_target_bytes_hex; construct the frozen dataclass with exactly the declared fields

physical_mutation_CLAIM_SCOPE_json.constructor_rule: hex-decode payload_bytes_hex and paired_target_bytes_hex; construct the frozen dataclass with exactly the declared fields
physical_mutation_CLAIM_SCOPE_json.mutation_rule: xor 0x01 at byte offset 0; retain original expected length and SHA-256

physical_mutation_CLAIM_SEMANTIC_json.constructor_rule: hex-decode payload_bytes_hex and paired_target_bytes_hex; construct the frozen dataclass with exactly the declared fields
physical_mutation_CLAIM_SEMANTIC_json.mutation_rule: xor 0x01 at byte offset 0; retain original expected length and SHA-256

physical_mutation_PREPARATION_PLAN_json.constructor_rule: hex-decode payload_bytes_hex and paired_target_bytes_hex; construct the frozen dataclass with exactly the declared fields
physical_mutation_PREPARATION_PLAN_json.mutation_rule: xor 0x01 at byte offset 0; retain original expected length and SHA-256

physical_mutation_PREPARED_UNIT_json.constructor_rule: hex-decode payload_bytes_hex and paired_target_bytes_hex; construct the frozen dataclass with exactly the declared fields
physical_mutation_PREPARED_UNIT_json.mutation_rule: xor 0x01 at byte offset 0; retain original expected length and SHA-256

import_graph.rule: No reverse import, runtime registration, or duplicated grammar/binding table.

permitted_imports: relative imports from the five candidate source modules only

ValidationResult.success: code is a declared success and established_assurances equals the unique global tuple; no value fields exist
ValidationResult.non_success: code is the exact first error/stop and established_assurances=()

CanonicalBytesResult.success: value is non-null exact immutable bytes and code/assurances equal the global mapping

DigestResult.success: digest_sha256 is non-null exact 64-character lowercase hexadecimal SHA-256 and code/assurances equal the global mapping

RegistryDefinitionIndexResult.success: index is non-null and every index field is fully populated; code/assurances equal the global mapping

BindingResolutionResult.success: binding is non-null exact frozen-production SchemaBinding; code/assurances equal the global mapping

PhysicalPayloadResult.success: observed_size_bytes and observed_sha256 are both non-null actual observations
PhysicalPayloadResult.ERR_PHYSICAL_EXPECTATION_INVALID: observed_size_bytes=null; observed_sha256=null because expectations fail before observation
PhysicalPayloadResult.ERR_PHYSICAL_SIZE_MISMATCH: observed_size_bytes and observed_sha256 are both non-null actual observations
PhysicalPayloadResult.ERR_PHYSICAL_SHA256_MISMATCH: observed_size_bytes and observed_sha256 are both non-null actual observations

_PrivateBindingMatchResult.PRIVATE_BINDING_MATCH_MULTIPLE: matching_bindings is the exact candidate-order tuple of every matching injected candidate
_PrivateBindingMatchResult.PRIVATE_BINDING_MATCH_EXACTLY_ONE: matching_bindings is the exact one-element tuple containing the sole matching candidate

_PrivateDescriptorSetInvariantResult.PRIVATE_DESCRIPTOR_SET_INVARIANTS_VALID: summaries is the exact non-null ordinal-order tuple consumed by the public wrapper

exact_pinned_success_payload_authority.registry_index: Exact direct-key tuple derived only from pinned accepted-registry bytes at anchor/hash; no role/reference subset is an alternative authority.
exact_pinned_success_payload_authority.schema_binding: Exact immutable frozen-production binding returned only after accepted-registry index, grammar, query, and exactly-one-match success.

private_helper_coverage.private_outcome_rule: Private helper cases use private outcome enums and never appear in I0AResultCode coverage.
